textByHash.8c4717b99756f61411c1cbf9b286a7fbebd1de7a: Argh... run down it is! But since Tempoross showed up, seadogs from all across Gielinor have been coming to wrangle the beast. It only made sense to sell off our spare resources.
textByHash.f3fd3796782bae47d4d0e1a67597c0924d5ad212: The name's Ishmael. I sell fishing supplies, along with some of the local catch.
